name: convert-slides
description: Convert Markdown documents to Microsoft PowerPoint (PPTX) using Pandoc, with automatic Mermaid diagram rendering when mermaid-cli is available.
author: AgentX

args.name: Folders
args.description: Comma-separated list of folders to convert (default: docs/prd,docs/adr,docs/specs,docs/ux,docs/reviews)

args.name: Files
args.description: Comma-separated list of specific .md files to convert (overrides Folders when set)

args.name: Template
args.description: Path to a PPTX reference template for styling (optional)

args.name: Output
args.description: Output folder for generated .pptx files (default: alongside source)

args.name: SlideLevel
args.description: Heading level that starts a new slide (default: 2)

args.name: MermaidTheme
args.description: Mermaid theme for diagram rendering: default, dark, forest, neutral (default: default)

args.name: MermaidWidth
args.description: Pixel width for rendered Mermaid PNGs (default: 1600 for 16:9 slides)

args.name: NoMermaid
args.description: Switch: skip Mermaid pre-rendering even if mermaid-cli is installed
